name: coderabbit-threads
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the coderabbit-threads skill — walk a PR's open CodeRabbit review threads conversationally, with autonomous replies for the obvious cases and an ask-once self-close policy for the rest.

plugins.name: coderabbit-threads
plugins.description: Walk through a PR's open CodeRabbit review threads, triage each one, and reply per-thread — the conversational counterpart to coderabbit:autofix.
